div.p: Different model families = different blind spots = real review
Both run via Ollama, locally Both use Q4_K_M quantization Both stay fully offline
~3-5s per role transition on single-GPU machines. Mitigate with OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=24h + OLLAMA_MAX_LOADED_MODELS=2
qwen2.5-coder:14b ≈ 9 GB gemma4:e4b ≈ 6 GB Combined ≈ 15 GB Fits on most 24 GB cards
